calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order To Modify Agreement Of Transfer.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Dodd for Jewish Community Federation.

The Court stated that it has a problem with the request and expressed its conerns. Ms. Dodd addressed the following issues: value of the fund, why they want this change, the rate of return, the commitees position/consent, change in economy, drop in interest rates, distributions not being consistant with current patterns, etc. The Petition for Order to Modify Agreement of Transfer, etc. was taken under submission. The Court stated that it was likely to deny the administrative request and that it would give more consideration to whether or not to grant the spending provision.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)
